input.command: for symbol in usdc dai weth matic; do echo -n "$symbol: "; curl -sI "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/$symbol.png" 2>&1 | grep "HTTP" | head -1; done

state.output:
usdc: HTTP/2 200 
dai: HTTP/2 200 
weth: HTTP/2 404 
matic: HTTP/2 200

metadata.output:
usdc: HTTP/2 200 
dai: HTTP/2 200 
weth: HTTP/2 404 
matic: HTTP/2 200
